option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[env:esp32doit-devkit-v1] platform = espressif32 board = esp32doit-devkit-v1 framework = arduino lib_deps = pololu/QTRSensors @ ^4.0.0
upload_speed = 921600 monitor_speed = 115200 monitor_port = COM3 monitor_filters = default time

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[env:esp32doit-devkit-v1] platform = espressif32 board = esp32doit-devkit-v1 framework = arduino lib_deps = pololu/QTRSensors @ ^4.0.0
upload_port = COM3 upload_speed = 921600 monitor_speed = 115200 monitor_port = COM3 monitor_filters = default time
